For S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Defend the Bucket Key Version Identity model · Theory Bucket Key Ver…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, file, object, policy, transfer, integrity, cache, fault, cost, restore, and controlled AWS transfer evidence: A key uniquely identifies immutable bytes across versioned writes. Type annotations, generated SDK shapes, and resolved promises do not strengthen that runtime claim.
